payload:
# CravingsPH — Frontend UI Scaffold

## Objective

Scaffold the complete frontend for CravingsPH: all pages, components, route wirings, and state management across three portals (Customer, Owner, Admin) covering all 7 PRD phases. Use shadcn/ui with the established design system.

## Spec Directory

All design artifacts are in `specs/frontend-ui-scaffold/`:
- `design.md` — **primary reference**: routes, component trees, state, interfaces
- `plan.md` — 16-step implementation plan (follow in ... [truncated, 3171 chars total]
Step 2a complete: restaurant page route (/restaurant/[slug]), RestaurantHeader, CopyContactButton, loading skeleton. TypeScript + Biome clean. Commit: 46ac42c

Step 2b complete: category tabs (horizontal scroll pills + IntersectionObserver), menu section list, menu item cards, quick-add button, restaurant-menu orchestrator. Added branch.listPublicByRestaurant endpoint. TypeScript + Biome clean. Commit: dbe895e

Step 2c complete: MenuItemSheet (Vaul drawer) with variant selector (RadioGroup), modifier groups (radio/checkbox with min/max validation), quantity picker, live price calc. Wired into RestaurantMenu. TypeScript + Biome clean. Commit: 2155014

Step 2d complete: MenuSearchSheet (Vaul drawer direction=top) with word-based fuzzy search, useDeferredValue debounce, auto-focus, reuses MenuItemCard. Wired into RestaurantMenu. TypeScript + Biome clean. Commit: 0f749c0. Step 2 fully complete.

Step 3a complete: Cart store (Zustand + persist) with smart merging (isEqual compares menuItemId+variant+modifiers), collision detection on update, branch scoping, auto-remove on zero qty. Selectors: useCartItems/Total/Count/Branch/Actions. Helper: computeUnitPrice. Commit: 3c97e52. Step 3b (cart UI) unblocked.
Step 3b complete: Cart UI components (CartFloatingButton, CartDrawer, CartItem, CartSummary). All presentational/props-based. Commit: 4105e4c. Step 3c (wire cart to menu) unblocked.

Step 3c complete: Wire cart to menu — InlineQuantityPicker, CartFloatingButton + CartDrawer rendered from RestaurantMenu, cart edit reopens sheet in edit mode, branch scoping. Commit: fb1ac34. Step 3 (Cart system) fully done.

Step 4a complete: Checkout sheet — OrderTypeSelector (dine-in/pickup cards), adaptive form (conditional validation), order summary, wired to cart drawer. Submission stubbed. Commit: 71a84f1. Next: Step 4b (OrderConfirmationSheet).

Step 4b complete: Order confirmation sheet — success icon, order ID display, View Order Status + Back to Menu buttons. Full checkout flow wired: cart → checkout → confirmation → (navigate to tracking or back to menu). Commit: cf07797. Step 4 fully complete. Next: Step 5 (Payment flow).

Step 5a complete: PaymentMethodCard (method type icon, account details, copy button) + PaymentCountdown (timer with Progress bar, MM:SS, urgent/expired states). Commit: 0274dcd. Next: Step 5b (PaymentProofForm).

Step 5b complete: PaymentProofForm with reference number input (zod validated) + optional screenshot upload (file preview + remove). Exports PaymentProofSubmitPayload. Commit: b011059. Next: Step 5c (PaymentSheet + wire to checkout flow).

Step 5c complete: PaymentSheet composing countdown + methods + proof form + cash option. Wired to checkout flow via OrderConfirmationSheet onPayment callback. Commit: 6ffb552. Step 5 (Payment Flow) fully done. Next: Step 6 (Order Tracking).

Step 6a complete: StatusStep (3 visual states with timeline line), OrderStatusTracker (vertical timeline with OrderStatus type), OrderDetails (card with items + payment badge). Commit: cc50d76. Next: Step 6b (order tracking page route).

Step 6b complete: Order tracking page at /restaurant/[slug]/order/[orderId] with compact header, OrderStatusTracker, OrderDetails, PaymentSheet wiring, and stub data. Commit: efb7c88. Step 6 fully done. Next: Step 7 (Discovery + home page).

Step 7a complete: Discovery presentational components (HeroSection, CuisinePill, RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardList, ScanQRCTA) in src/features/discovery/components/. Commit: 335737c. Next: Step 7b (home page with stub data).

Step 7b complete: Discovery home page composed with stub data. HeroSection + CuisinePills scroll + RestaurantCardList (featured horizontal, nearby vertical) + ScanQRCTA. Commit: 6584be4. Next: Step 7c (search page).

Step 7c complete: Search page with LocationFilter (Metro Manila stubs), CuisineFilter (toggle pills), and filtered results grid. URL-driven state via searchParams. Commit: 531da7a. Step 7 fully complete. Next: Step 8.

Step 8 complete: Owner registration page at /register/owner (org name + email + password + Google OAuth, localStorage bridge for onboarding). Post-login smart routing via organization.mine check (admin→/admin, owner→/organization, customer→/). Customer register cross-links to owner register. Commit: f5f4c09. Next: Step 9.
